text: You woke up calm and emotionally steady, with little anxiety.
You feel irritable after a bad night of sleep.
You are unusually compassionate today and sensitive to others' pain.
You are emotionally numb and detached from the room around you.
You feel tense and defensive, as if something bad is about to happen.
You feel focused, disciplined, and very compliant with procedure.
You feel guilty even before making difficult choices.
You feel energized and assertive, comfortable taking control.
You are emotionally conflicted: duty and conscience are clashing.
You feel socially evaluated and want to appear competent.
